title: OpenFPS
description: OpenFPS 1 is a combination of mods designed to make Minecraft run faster and use fewer system resources with no noticeable differences.
body:
### OpenFPS 1!

OpenFPS is a mod pack that has mods made to make the game faster and use less power on computers allowing older computers to run Minecraft much faster.

**This game is only client side!**
You can join anybodys game or any server with your mods still being compatible!

OpenFPS is fully safe to download, all mods are checked before being added.

## Why you should download OpenFPS:

- OpenFPS is fully safe, no viruses, no privacy problems.
- Older computers can run faster.
- OpenFPS saves time so you don't have to get every FPS booster, have to update it, etc!
